FOR DEFENDANT NEUTRON HOLDINGS, INC. -- PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/18/25 IS CONTINUED TO 6/16/25 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. DISCOVERY AND ALL MOTION CUT-OFFS CORRESPOND TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION WHICH IS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, MR. TSANG, TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE BY END OF DAY ON 1/21/25 FOR THE CONTINUANCE WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT MOVING PARTY WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO OBTAIN THE CONTINUED TRIAL DATE. CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2025 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-07-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming Admitted The Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions, Set Two; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar May-01-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Jesse Torres 303-269-9097 Plaintiff in Pro Per
Mark Sandberg, Esq. (408) 279-5393 BOWMAN AND BROOKE LLP for Defendant Neutron Holdings, Inc., dba Limebike

ARGUED. The Court states the notice to contest was late and there was no copy to the opposing side. The Court admonishes Mr. Torres and denies his request for an extension. The Court instructs Plaintiff to make himself available to the opposing side, to respond within 24 hours, address anything received and communicate with Mr. Sandberg. Mr. Sandberg responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling on all the discovery motions.

1 - DEFENDANT NEUTRON HOLDINGS, INC. DBA LIME's Motion For An Order Deeming Admitted The Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions, Set Two.

Moving party shall provide a proposed order on EACH motion.
